text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
Every Umamusume excels in particular
distances and tracks.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
The trick is to form teams based on the
aptitudes of your racers!

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
Also note that, as you go, adding more
highly skilled Veteran Umamusume to
your team will raise your Team Rank.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
Let's continue training strong runners to
raise your Team Rank higher and higher!
It's a great way to show your ability. ♪
